base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of message_box_banner_en — a ui (dialog) from 1986 dragon quest. Stylized 'DRAGON QUEST' dialogue-banner in black + yellow/bronze. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stylized 'DRAGON QUEST' dialogue-banner in black + yellow/bronze; may be dialog/message box header graphic
